top.title: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
top.summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

top.title: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
top.summary: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

top.title: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
top.summary: The largest and most powerful rocket in history blasted off after its first attempted launch was postponed.

top.title: AI may speed up search for drugs to treat brain conditions
top.summary: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.

top.title: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
top.summary: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".

top.title: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
top.summary: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
